The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JILL LUCKHURST and CHERYL BREWSTER's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to December 18, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C and provide courtesy copies of the reply and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than November 25, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6CB and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than November 25, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.
